# Docusaurus -- Core Configuration & Sidebars

> Site configuration, preset-classic setup, sidebar patterns, navbar/footer, and custom pages. Reference from [SKILL.md](../SKILL.md).

**Related examples:**

- [content.md](content.md) -- MDX features, admonitions, tabs, code blocks, blog plugin
- [customization.md](customization.md) -- Swizzling, CSS variables, versioning, i18n, deployment

---

## Production-Ready docusaurus.config.js

```javascript
// docusaurus.config.js
import { themes as prismThemes } from "prism-react-renderer";

export default {
  title: "My Project",
  tagline: "Documentation for My Project",
  url: "https://docs.example.com",
  baseUrl: "/",
  onBrokenLinks: "throw",
  onBrokenMarkdownLinks: "throw",
  onBrokenAnchors: "throw",
  favicon: "img/favicon.ico",

  // GitHub Pages deployment config
  organizationName: "my-org",
  projectName: "my-project",

  i18n: {
    defaultLocale: "en",
    locales: ["en"],
  },

  presets: [
    [
      "@docusaurus/preset-classic",
      {
        docs: {
          sidebarPath: "./sidebars.js",
          editUrl: "https://github.com/my-org/my-project/edit/main/docs-site/",
          showLastUpdateTime: true,
          showLastUpdateAuthor: true,
          breadcrumbs: true,
        },
        blog: {
          showReadingTime: true,
          editUrl: "https://github.com/my-org/my-project/edit/main/docs-site/",
          blogSidebarCount: "ALL",
          blogSidebarTitle: "All Posts",
        },
        theme: {
          customCss: ["./src/css/custom.css"],
        },
        sitemap: {
          changefreq: "weekly",
          priority: 0.5,
        },
      },
    ],
  ],

  themeConfig: {
    image: "img/social-card.png",
    navbar: {
      title: "My Project",
      logo: { alt: "My Project Logo", src: "img/logo.svg" },
      hideOnScroll: true,
      items: [
        {
          type: "docSidebar",
          sidebarId: "docs",
          position: "left",
          label: "Docs",
        },
        { to: "/blog", label: "Blog", position: "left" },
        // Version dropdown (only if versioning is enabled)
        { type: "docsVersionDropdown", position: "right" },
        // External link
        {
          href: "https://github.com/my-org/my-project",
          label: "GitHub",
          position: "right",
        },
      ],
    },
    footer: {
      style: "dark",
      links: [
        {
          title: "Docs",
          items: [
            { label: "Getting Started", to: "/docs/intro" },
            { label: "API Reference", to: "/docs/api" },
          ],
        },
        {
          title: "Community",
          items: [
            {
              label: "GitHub Discussions",
              href: "https://github.com/my-org/my-project/discussions",
            },
          ],
        },
      ],
      copyright: `Copyright \u00a9 ${new Date().getFullYear()} My Org. Built with Docusaurus.`,
    },
    docs: {
      sidebar: {
        hideable: true,
        autoCollapseCategories: true,
      },
    },
    prism: {
      theme: prismThemes.github,
      darkTheme: prismThemes.dracula,
      additionalLanguages: ["bash", "json", "yaml", "toml"],
    },
    colorMode: {
      defaultMode: "light",
      respectPrefersColorScheme: true,
    },
    tableOfContents: {
      minHeadingLevel: 2,
      maxHeadingLevel: 3,
    },
  },
};
```

---

## Sidebar Patterns

### Autogenerated Sidebar (Recommended)

```javascript
// sidebars.js — let the filesystem drive the structure
export default {
  docs: [{ type: "autogenerated", dirName: "." }],
};
```

Control order with front matter in each doc:

```markdown
---
sidebar_position: 1
sidebar_label: Introduction
---

# Welcome to My Project
```

Control category metadata with `_category_.json` in each directory:

```json
// docs/guides/_category_.json
{
  "label": "Guides",
  "position": 2,
  "collapsible": true,
  "collapsed": false,
  "link": {
    "type": "generated-index",
    "title": "Guides Overview",
    "description": "All available guides"
  }
}
```

**Why good:** Sidebar structure stays in sync with the filesystem, new docs appear automatically, ordering is co-located with content

---

### Manual Sidebar

```javascript
// sidebars.js — full manual control
export default {
  docs: [
    "intro",
    {
      type: "category",
      label: "Getting Started",
      collapsed: false,
      items: [
        "getting-started/installation",
        "getting-started/quick-start",
        "getting-started/project-structure",
      ],
    },
    {
      type: "category",
      label: "Guides",
      items: [
        "guides/configuration",
        "guides/deployment",
        {
          type: "category",
          label: "Advanced",
          items: ["guides/advanced/plugins", "guides/advanced/theming"],
        },
      ],
    },
    {
      type: "link",
      label: "API Reference",
      href: "https://api.example.com",
    },
  ],
};
```

---

### Multiple Sidebars

When you have separate doc sections (e.g., user docs and API docs), use multiple sidebars:

```javascript
// sidebars.js
export default {
  docs: [{ type: "autogenerated", dirName: "guides" }],
  api: [{ type: "autogenerated", dirName: "api" }],
};
```

Wire each sidebar to a navbar item:

```javascript
// In themeConfig.navbar.items
{ type: 'docSidebar', sidebarId: 'docs', label: 'Guides', position: 'left' },
{ type: 'docSidebar', sidebarId: 'api', label: 'API', position: 'left' },
```

---

### Custom Sidebar Items Generator

Override default generation logic to inject items, reorder, or filter:

```javascript
// In docs plugin options
docs: {
  async sidebarItemsGenerator({ defaultSidebarItemsGenerator, ...args }) {
    const items = await defaultSidebarItemsGenerator(args);
    // Reverse the order
    return items.reverse();
  },
}
```

---

## Multiple Docs Plugin Instances

Use multiple instances when you need completely independent doc sets with separate versioning:

```javascript
// docusaurus.config.js
export default {
  plugins: [
    [
      "@docusaurus/plugin-content-docs",
      {
        id: "community",
        path: "community",
        routeBasePath: "community",
        sidebarPath: "./sidebarsCommunity.js",
      },
    ],
  ],
  presets: [
    [
      "@docusaurus/preset-classic",
      {
        docs: {
          // This is the default/main docs instance
          sidebarPath: "./sidebars.js",
          routeBasePath: "docs",
        },
      },
    ],
  ],
};
```

**Key gotcha:** Each plugin instance needs a unique `id`. The preset's docs plugin has an implicit `id` of `'default'`. When linking between instances, use the full path (`/community/intro`) not relative doc IDs.

---

## Docs-Only Mode

Remove the landing page and serve docs at the root URL:

```javascript
// docusaurus.config.js
export default {
  presets: [
    [
      "@docusaurus/preset-classic",
      {
        docs: {
          routeBasePath: "/", // Serve docs at root
          sidebarPath: "./sidebars.js",
        },
        blog: false, // Disable blog
        pages: false, // Disable custom pages (optional)
      },
    ],
  ],
};
```

Delete `src/pages/index.js` — it would conflict with the docs root. One doc must have `slug: /` in its front matter to serve as the homepage:

```markdown
---
slug: /
sidebar_position: 1
---

# Welcome
```

---

## Custom Pages

### React Page

```tsx
// src/pages/support.tsx
import Layout from "@theme/Layout";

export default function Support(): JSX.Element {
  return (
    <Layout title="Support" description="Get help with My Project">
      <main style={{ padding: "2rem" }}>
        <h1>Support</h1>
        <p>File issues on GitHub or join our community chat.</p>
      </main>
    </Layout>
  );
}
```

Route: `/support` (derived from filename)

### MDX Page

```mdx
## <!-- src/pages/about.mdx -->

title: About
description: About this project

---

# About This Project

This page uses **MDX** so you can mix Markdown with React components.

import Link from "@docusaurus/Link";

<Link to="/docs/intro">Read the docs</Link>
```

Route: `/about`

---

## Navbar Item Types

| Type                    | Purpose                                | Example Config                                             |
| ----------------------- | -------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| `'doc'`                 | Link to a specific doc                 | `{ type: 'doc', docId: 'intro', label: 'Intro' }`          |
| `'docSidebar'`          | Link to first item in a sidebar        | `{ type: 'docSidebar', sidebarId: 'docs', label: 'Docs' }` |
| `'dropdown'`            | Dropdown menu                          | `{ type: 'dropdown', label: 'More', items: [...] }`        |
| `'docsVersionDropdown'` | Version selector dropdown              | `{ type: 'docsVersionDropdown', position: 'right' }`       |
| `'docsVersion'`         | Link to a specific version             | `{ type: 'docsVersion', version: '1.0.0' }`                |
| `'localeDropdown'`      | Language selector                      | `{ type: 'localeDropdown', position: 'right' }`            |
| `'search'`              | Search bar                             | `{ type: 'search', position: 'right' }`                    |
| `'html'`                | Custom HTML in navbar                  | `{ type: 'html', value: '<badge>Beta</badge>' }`           |
| default                 | Regular link (internal `to` or `href`) | `{ label: 'Blog', to: '/blog' }`                           |
